args.text: Retention rules checked: exports held 30 days, then deletion per deletion-schedule.

args.subject: Fernwood Ltd: data export manifest prepared
args.body: The data export manifest for Fernwood Ltd has been prepared and is ready for processing.

args.subject: Your Halcyon access has now ended
args.body: Your Halcyon account access has been revoked as per the contract end date of 30 April. Your data export has been prepared and will be retained for 30 days before deletion per the agreed retention schedule.

args.subject: Your pro-rata Halcyon refund
args.body: A pro-rata refund of 240.00 has been issued to order ORD-3320 following the contract end date of 30 April. The refund will be processed shortly.

args.text: Pro-rata refund of 240.00 issued to order ORD-3320 and customer notified at accounts@fernwood.example.

args.subject: Fernwood Ltd: deletion schedule confirmed
args.body: The deletion schedule for Fernwood Ltd data has been confirmed. All exported datasets will be permanently deleted on 2026-08-16, consistent with the 30-day retention period.

args.subject: Fernwood Ltd offboarding complete
args.body: Fernwood Ltd offboarding has been completed successfully. All data export obligations, access revocation, refund processing, and deletion scheduling have been fulfilled and documented.
